messages.subject: [R-sig-genetics] Multivariate analysis of ecological communities in R with the VEGAN package
messages.subject_clean: Multivariate analysis of ecological communities in R with the VEGAN package
messages.body_plain:
This course moght intererst some liat memebers.



Multivariate analysis of ecological communities in R with the VEGAN package
(VGNR02)

29 April 2019 - 3 May 2019

https://www.prstatistics.com/course/multivariate-analysis-of-ecological-communities-in-r-with-the-vegan-package-vgnr02/

Course Overview:
This 5-day course will cover the concepts, methods, and R tools that can be
used to analyse community ecology data. The course will review data
processing techniques relevant to multivariate data sets. We will cover
diversity and null-model analysis, distance measures and distance based
multivariate methods, clustering, classification, and dimension reduction
techniques using the vegan

Email oliverhooker*@prstatistics.com*

Check out our sister sites,

www.PRstatistics.com (Ecology and Life Sciences)

www.PRinformatics.com (Bioinformatics and data science)

www.PSstatistics.com (Behaviour and cognition)

MACHINE LEARNING (MLUR01)

Glasgow, Scotland, Dr Aristides (Aris) Moustakas

https://www.prstatistics.com/course/machine-learning-using-r-mlur01/
